data.title: An address sold 886.31 WBTC, worth $58.53 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a new address (0x44f...8C91A) sold 886.31 WBTC on-chain in the past 5 hours, worth $58.53 million, with an average selling price of $66,044.99. The funds came through Defiway cross-chain six months ago and were consolidated and sold by dozens of addresses six hours ago.

data.title: US stocks closed mixed in the crypto sector, with HOD rising over 10.65%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.26%, the S&P 500 rose 0.56%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.78%. The crypto sector was mixed, with HOD rising over 10.65%, ALTS rising over 4.9%, ABTC falling 4.59%, and MSTR falling 2.7%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Fed mouthpiece: Fed meeting minutes no longer specify timeline for inflation returning to 2%.
data.description: Nick Timiraos, often referred to as the "Federal Reserve mouthpiece," wrote that the omissions in this year's Fed meeting minutes are more noteworthy. He pointed out that in multiple meetings up to December last year, staff predicted inflation would fall to 2% by 2027, but the December minutes pushed that date back to 2028. The January meeting minutes did not specify a concrete timeframe for inflation reaching 2%, only stating that the figure was "slightly higher, but balanced" compared to the December forecast, and anticipating that the impact of tariffs would subside by mid-year, after which inflation would return to its previous downward trend. The previous statement about "reaching 2% by 2028" was not present.

data.title: OpenAI Nears Completion of Major Funding Round Exceeding $100 Billion
data.description:
OpenAI is reportedly nearing the completion of the initial phase of a significant funding round, which is expected to raise over $100 billion. Bloomberg posted on X, citing sources familiar with the matter, that the artificial intelligence company is in advanced discussions to secure this substantial investment. The funding round is anticipated to bolster OpenAI's capabilities and expand its operations in the rapidly evolving AI sector.

The move comes as OpenAI continues to innovate and develop cutting-edge AI technologies, attracting considerable interest from investors eager to capitalize on the growing demand for AI solutions. This funding round is set to enhance OpenAI's position in the industry, enabling further advancements and research in artificial intelligence.

While specific details regarding the investors involved or the timeline for the completion of the funding round remain undisclosed, the substantial amount being raised underscores the confidence in OpenAI's potential and the broader AI market. The company has been at the forefront of AI development, contributing significantly to advancements in machine learning and artificial intelligence applications.

OpenAI's efforts to secure this funding highlight the increasing importance of AI technologies in various sectors, including healthcare, finance, and technology. As the company moves forward with this funding round, it is poised to make significant strides in AI research and development, further solidifying its role as a leader in the field.

data.title: Significant Sale of $WBTC Worth $58.53 Million Observed
data.description: A notable transaction involving Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) has been observed, with a new address, 0x44f…8C91A, selling 886.31 WBTC valued at $58.53 million over the past five hours. Analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X. The average selling price was $66,044.99 per WBTC. The funds were initially transferred via Defiway six months ago and were consolidated from multiple addresses for this sale.

data.title: Large PUMP Token Holder Sells 2.07 Billion Tokens, Impacting Market Sentiment
data.description: Onchain Lens monitoring has identified significant activity from the address '77DsB,' which has sold approximately 2.07 billion PUMP tokens, converting them into around 4.55 million USDC. According to NS3.AI, despite these sales, the address still retains about 1.676 billion PUMP tokens, valued at approximately $3.38 million. This substantial movement of tokens by a large holder could potentially influence market sentiment.

data.title: Aptos updates its token economic model: supply capped at 2.1 billion tokens, gas fees increased tenfold, and a buyback program launched.
data.description: Aptos has announced an update to its token economics model, shifting to a performance-driven token supply mechanism that links APT supply to actual network usage. Specifically, the update includes seven key changes: 1. Reducing staking rewards and incentivizing long-term stakers. The Aptos Foundation has proposed reducing the annualized staking reward rate from 5.19% to 2.6%. Additionally, the Aptos Foundation is exploring a governance proposal to change the staking framework to better align incentives with long-term network participation. 2. Increasing gas fees tenfold. Aptos is currently one of the lowest-cost blockchains, and given the current low transaction fees, the Aptos Foundation will propose increasing gas fees tenfold, while still maintaining stablecoin transfer fees on the network at approximately $0.00014. 3. Transaction utilization and fees. Decibel, a decentralized exchange protocol on the Aptos blockchain, introduces a new deflationary mechanism that will massively consume and destroy APT through high-frequency trading activity. Currently, all transactions or "gas fees" paid on the network in the form of APT will be permanently destroyed. Incubated by Aptos Labs in partnership with the Decibel Foundation, Decibel represents one of the first fully decentralized exchanges to execute all trading activities on-chain: every order, matching, and cancellation is executed on-chain. With 100% on-chain execution, the Decibel mainnet launch will significantly increase the transaction throughput of the Aptos blockchain. 4. A hard supply cap of 2.1 billion APT is fixed. Once approved by the community, no new tokens can be minted beyond this cap. 5. The Foundation permanently locks 210 million APT. The Aptos Foundation will ensure that 210 million APT is locked and permanently staked on the network. These tokens will never be sold or distributed and are permanently locked. 6. Performance-linked grant issuance. Going forward, the Aptos Foundation will primarily focus on providing future grants and rewards, which will only be cashed out upon achieving key milestones related to Aptos' role as a "global trading engine." 7. Launch a programmatic buyback program. The Aptos Foundation has committed to exploring a protocol buyback program or reserve that will programmatically repurchase APT on the open market based on market opportunities.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $2.2062 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a net outflow of $2.2062 million yesterday (February 18th, Eastern Time). Only the Grayscale XRP Trust ETF (GXRP) experienced a net outflow yesterday, with a single-day net outflow of $2.2062 million, while its historical total net inflow has reached $129 million. As of press time, the XRP spot ETF's total net asset value is $1.022 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.18%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.227 billion.

data.title: USD/JPY Reaches New High Since February
data.description: The USD/JPY exchange rate has surpassed 155, marking its highest level since February 10. According to ChainCatcher, the currency pair experienced a daily increase of 0.15%. This development highlights the ongoing fluctuations in the foreign exchange market.

data.title: New Zealand's Central Bank Anticipates Economic Recovery Without Inflation
data.description: New Zealand's central bank is forecasting a robust economic recovery this year, while managing to avoid inflationary pressures, according to Assistant Governor Karen Silk. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Silk's comments on the country's unique economic position. The central bank's outlook suggests that New Zealand's economy is poised for growth, driven by various factors that do not contribute to rising inflation. This optimistic projection comes amid global economic uncertainties, where many countries are grappling with inflation challenges. The central bank's strategy and economic policies are expected to play a crucial role in maintaining this balance, ensuring sustainable growth without overheating the economy.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | U.S. Plans First 'Peace Committee' Meeting Amid International Skepticism
data.description: The United States is set to hold the inaugural meeting of the so-called 'Peace Committee' in Washington, D.C., on February 19. According to Jin10, the agenda includes discussions on fundraising for the reconstruction of the Gaza Strip. However, the initiative has faced a lukewarm reception since its inception, with several countries expressing caution. Nations such as France, Norway, Spain, and New Zealand have already indicated they have no intention of joining the committee.

data.title: Riot rallies 6% after shareholder demands rapid AI and HPC expansion
data.description:
Riot’s stock rose 6% after Starboard Value urged it to speed up AI and HPC deals.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/riot-rallies-6/

data.title: Uniswap Proposes Expansion of Protocol Fees Across Multiple Chains
data.description: Uniswap has announced on the X platform that a proposal to expand protocol fees is now live. According to ChainCatcher, the update aims to activate fees for all remaining v3 pools on the mainnet and enable protocol fees for both v2 and v3 on eight additional chains.

data.title: Why is World Liberty Financial’s WLFI up by 20% today?
data.description:
WLFI is up 20% today because World Liberty Financial has said it plans to tokenize loan revenue tied to the Trump International Hotel & Resort now being built in the Maldives. Traders reacted fast. The token is now linked to projected resort loan income, and that pushed WLFI higher during a week when the broader […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/why-is-wlfi-up-by-20-today/

data.title: WLFI will partner with DarGlobal and Securitize to tokenize the revenue rights of the Trump Hotel loan in the Maldives.
data.description: World Liberty Financial (WLFI) announced a partnership with DarGlobal and Securitize to tokenize its loan interest and revenue-sharing rights for the Trump International Hotel & Resort, Maldives project. This is the first tokenization project under its WLFI brand, RWA. The hotel project, developed by DarGlobal in partnership with The Trump Organization, is expected to be completed in 2030 and will feature approximately 100 ultra-luxury beach and overwater villas. WLFI stated that the token offering will be available to qualified investors, providing fixed income and cash flow exposure linked to loan returns. The offering will be conducted through Reg D 506(c) private placement and Reg S (limited to verified qualified investors or non-U.S. individuals only). Token transfer and resale will be subject to relevant restrictions.

data.title: Pumpfun-related addresses have sold a total of 2.07 billion PUMP, and still hold approximately 1.676 billion.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the address marked "77DsB" has been continuously selling PUMP tokens recently. Data shows that this address has sold approximately 2.07 billion PUMP tokens, receiving approximately 4.55 million USDC in return. Currently, this address still holds approximately 1.676 billion PUMP tokens, estimated to be worth approximately $3.38 million at current prices.

data.title: Eric Trump: Based on historical average annual growth rates, Bitcoin could rise to $1 million.
data.description: During the World Liberty Forum, Eric Trump stated that if Bitcoin's historical average annual price increase is around 70%, its price could reach $1 million. Trump also claimed that the Trump family's crypto projects aim to align with the policy direction of "the most crypto-friendly president," promoting a better regulatory environment and industry innovation.

data.title: Oil Futures Decline Amid Anticipated Technical Correction
data.description: Oil futures experienced a slight decline, attributed to a likely technical correction in the market. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting the recent movement in oil prices. Analysts suggest that the dip may be a result of traders adjusting positions following recent gains. Despite the decrease, the overall outlook for oil remains influenced by broader economic factors and geopolitical developments. Market participants are closely monitoring supply and demand dynamics, as well as potential impacts from global events. The fluctuation in oil prices underscores the volatility inherent in commodity markets, with traders remaining vigilant to shifts in market sentiment.

data.title: STOCKS | South Korean Exchange Activates KOSDAQ Trading Halt Due to Futures Surge
data.description: South Korea's exchange has implemented a temporary halt on KOSDAQ programmatic trading following a significant rise in KOSDAQ 150 futures. According to Jin10, the futures experienced a 6% increase, prompting a five-minute suspension of programmatic trading activities. This mechanism is designed to stabilize the market and prevent excessive volatility during rapid price movements. The exchange's decision reflects its commitment to maintaining orderly trading conditions and protecting investors from potential market disruptions.

data.title: Aptos Introduces New Tokenomics Framework to Enhance Token Deflation
data.description: Aptos (APT) has announced a revised tokenomics framework focused on reducing token issuance and enhancing the burning process. According to NS3.AI, the updated framework includes capping the total supply at 2.1 billion APT, nearly halving staking rewards, increasing gas fees by tenfold, and permanently locking a significant number of tokens. Additionally, the launch of the Decibel DEX and changes to the grant and buyback systems are intended to further bolster token deflation.
